sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5056" key="a)mblw/simos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμβλ-ώσιμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5056.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to abortion,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:275" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">275</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
